title: culiatum-rp
description: Culiatum RP is a Fabric mod for Minecraft 1.21.11 focused on combat control, admin-driven bounty tools, and server-side gameplay rules for the Culiatum server ecosystem.
body:
# Culiatum RP

Culiatum RP is an alpha Fabric mod built for the **Culiatum server ecosystem**.

It focuses on combat control, bounty-style tracking tools, and server-managed gameplay rules. This project is designed around curated server experiences, where admins can control how core systems are used without relying on large general-purpose PvP overhauls.

## Features

### Combat Tagging
- Applies combat status during valid player combat
- Blocks configured teleport-related commands while in combat
- Also supports hostile mob combat tagging for players (when attacked)

### Recall Potion
- Custom potion item that returns the player to spawn
- Brewed from an awkward potion and a nether star
- No throwable variant

### Radar Missions
- Admin-controlled radar item for bounty-style missions
- Assign a hunter, a target, and a time limit
- Right-click to display target distance in the action bar
- Includes a cooldown between uses
- Assignment expires automatically when time runs out
- Radar is removed automatically when the mission ends

### Villagers Trading
- Trading disabled with vanilla villagers and wandering merchant. Configurable (both false by default).

## Compatibility
Culiatum RP is designed to work well alongside the next mods:

- [Culiatum Economy](https://modrinth.com/mod/culiatum-economy)
- [Easy NPC's](https://modrinth.com/mod/easy-npc)
- [Essential Commands](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/essential-commands)

This mod is **not intended to be compatible with combat-tagging mods that provide similar systems**, since overlapping mechanics would conflict with its core behavior.

## Alpha Notice
This is an **early alpha release**. Features, commands, balancing, and internal systems may change over time as the mod evolves around the needs of the Culiatum server.
